commits: 2e16f19 - bober(sprint-3): coordinator rounds loop + runFleet blackboard branch

filesChanged.description: Widened Scaffolder interface 3rd optional param; runChildRound (scaffold-once round 1, reuse absPath rounds 2+, never-reject try/catch); executeRounds (bounded loop, early-stop on readAll().length unchanged for r>1).
runFleet branch: if(dbPath) ensureDir+SharedBlackboard.open+executeRounds in try/finally(close) else existing coordinator.execute; unchanged aggregate+reporter.write.
executeRounds tests: sc-3-3 scaffold-once, sc-3-4 early-stop (2 rounds not 3), sc-3-5 no-blackboard single-pass, sc-3-7 failing-child-no-throw.
sc-3-5 no-blackboard (execute called/executeRounds not/no db dir) + sc-3-6 blackboard path (real coordinator, scaffold 3rd arg = abs dbPath).

verification.test: 2781 passed, 3 skipped, 6 failed (all pre-known cockpit MCP); fleet 268 tests pass

notes: No-blackboard path byte-identical (execute() once, no SharedBlackboard.open, no ensureDir, no facts.db; 5 pre-existing coordinator tests + all index tests unchanged). Scaffold-once (round===1 gate; rounds>=2 recompute absPath=resolve(rootDir,child.folder)). Early-stop (r>1 && readAll().length===prevCount; prevCount updated after break check so round 1 never stops). Never-throw via runChildRound try/catch → ChildExecution with scaffold.error. fleet-report.json from FINAL round. Scaffolder widened with OPTIONAL 3rd param (not overload) so existing fakes type-compatible.
